default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review 2026 strategy, performance, and partnership renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Renewal:** The partnership renews March 3rd at the current rate of $12k/mo.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=2893.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Shift from condition-led to treatment-led content, which is driving high-intent traffic. PSEO expansion will focus on state-level pages, which are outperforming city pages (\~600 sessions/week vs. low traffic).](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [**Priority:** Build out insurance content, starting with editorial, to drive LTV. This is the top priority, ahead of the "Treatment Space" hub.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
  - [**Backlinking:** Innerwell requested backlinking be reinstated, citing a competitive gap. GrowthX will provide a quote, noting it may require reallocating budget from other deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=3037.0)

## Topics

### 2026 Strategic Alignment

  - [The team confirmed alignment on 2026 business goals:](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
    1.  [**Reduce CAC:** Build a scalable organic channel (editorial, PSEO) to decrease reliance on paid media.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
    2.  [**Expand Brand:** Position Innerwell as a full-spectrum practice, not just a ketamine provider.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
    3.  [**Drive LTV:** Use insurance coverage as a key patient acquisition and retention driver.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Organic Acquisition Goal:** Scale organic acquisition from its current 5–10% of total acquisitions.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

### Performance Review & Key Learnings

  - [**Editorial Content:** The new treatment-led strategy is driving significant growth in total and *engaged* sessions since September 1st.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
      - [**Why it works:** Content aligns directly with user search intent, signaling high value to Google and reducing bounce rates.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [**PSEO Pages:** Traffic has rebounded to \~700 weekly sessions after the October URL migration.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
      - [**Key Learning:** State-level pages are the clear winner, driving \~600 sessions/week, while city-level pages have not recovered.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility:** Innerwell's brand presence in AI responses increased from October to December, with several articles now appearing in Google's AI Overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)

### 2026 Strategic Plan & Priorities

  - [**Core Workstreams:**](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
      - [**Knowledge Hub:** Scale the proven editorial strategy, starting with ketamine and expanding to psychiatry and EMDR.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
      - [**PSEO Expansion:** Focus new location pages on state-level content for psychiatry and EMDR.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [**New Initiatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
      - [**Insurance Build-out (P1):** Create content and potentially a tool to help users check eligibility.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
          - [**Why:** To drive LTV and improve patient quality.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
          - [**Execution:** Start with editorial content, then scope a V2 eligibility widget.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
      - [**Treatment Space Hub (P2/Q2):** A lower-priority condition hub, inspired by Talkspace.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=2073.0)
  - [**Homepage Real Estate:** Akina questioned the value of the current homepage dropdown listing all 40+ states.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=2172.0)
      - [**Suggestion:** Reallocate this space to higher-value content like insurance or medication hubs.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=2172.0)

### Check That: AI Visibility Tool

  - [Andi demoed "Check That," a new proprietary tool replacing Scrunch for tracking LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=2297.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=2324.0)
      - [Tracks brand citations across a library of 100k+ prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=2324.0)
      - [Identifies citation sources (URLs) to reveal competitive strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=2606.0)
      - [Provides a collaborative workspace for Innerwell to customize tracked prompts and competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=2665.0)
  - [**Rollout:** Innerwell will receive access next week; the tool officially launches in early February.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=2791.0)

### Renewal & Backlinking Discussion

  - [**Renewal Package:** The $12k/mo renewal includes 5 articles/week, PSEO support, technical support, quarterly audits, and Check That access.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=2893.0)
  - [**Backlinking Request:** Noah requested backlinking be reinstated, citing a competitive gap.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=3037.0)
      - [**Context:** The previous backlinking effort was paused due to low-quality results.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=3037.0)
      - [**Decision:** GrowthX will provide a quote. Reinstating it may require reallocating budget from other deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=3037.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=3037.0)
      - [Provide a quote for reinstating backlinking.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=3037.0)
      - [Grant Check That access to Innerwell next week.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=2791.0)
      - [Schedule a strategic session to align on Check That prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=2850.0)
  - [**Innerwell:**](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Send daily QuickFight data readouts to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Evaluate the homepage real estate strategy for location links.](https://fathom.video/share/BsgofUHM7uJmtAYZb8xJEt6fHBb_5uub?tab=summary&timestamp=2172.0)

action_items.description: Send daily channel-level performance dashboard to Matt/Andi
Add page-level tracking tags for PSEO/blog; then share conversion metrics w/ Matt/Andi
Add general mental health awareness topics to editorial plan
Draft insurance content plan; publish editorial; then scope V2 eligibility widget w/ Noah/Andi
Grant CheckThat access to Akina/Noah; then schedule prompt-alignment session
Send backlinking quote/options to Noah/Akina; then align on budget and swap PSEO/editorial
